channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump raked in more than $1B through crypto ventures, federal filing shows
item.description: President Trump and his family took in more than $1 billion last year through crypto businesses, a federal filing released Wednesday revealed.
item.content:encoded: President Trump and his family took in more than $1 billion last year through crypto businesses, a federal filing released Wednesday revealed.
item.dc:creator: Linda Kenyon

item.title: Former White House ethics lawyer on Trump's $1B crypto earnings
item.description: NPR's A Martinez asks former White House ethics lawyer Richard Painter about President Trump's financial disclosure that showed he made over $1 billion from crypto businesses.
item.content:encoded: NPR's A Martinez asks former White House ethics lawyer Richard Painter about President Trump's financial disclosure that showed he made over $1 billion from crypto businesses.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump and his family took in over $1 billion in crypto earnings last year, Democratic Socialists pose challenge for Democratic party, U.S. defeats Bosnia-Herzegovina in World Cup knockout round.
item.content:encoded: Trump and his family took in over $1 billion in crypto earnings last year, Democratic Socialists pose challenge for Democratic party, U.S. defeats Bosnia-Herzegovina in World Cup knockout round.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Presidential library honoring Theodore Roosevelt opens in North Dakota
item.description: President Trump visited the nation's newest presidential library in North Dakota on Wednesday. It honors the legacy of Theodore Roosevelt. NPR received a tour of the new facility last week.
item.content:encoded: President Trump visited the nation's newest presidential library in North Dakota on Wednesday. It honors the legacy of Theodore Roosevelt. NPR received a tour of the new facility last week.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: U.S. job market slows in June
item.description: Employers added 57,000 jobs in June, the Labor Department said on Friday, as jobs growth slowed from the previous two months, while the unemployment rate ticked down to 4.2%.
item.content:encoded: Employers added 57,000 jobs in June, the Labor Department said on Friday, as jobs growth slowed from the previous two months, while the unemployment rate ticked down to 4.2%.
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley

item.title: With oil sale sanctions lifted, Iran potentially unlocks billions for regime
item.description: Iran enjoys an unexpected windfall as the U.S. lifts oil sanctions.
item.content:encoded: Iran enjoys an unexpected windfall as the U.S. lifts oil sanctions.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Northam

item.title: As a heatwave grips the U.S., a look at how extreme heat affects the body
item.description: As heatwaves sweep the country, NPR's A Martinez asks W. Larry Kenney, professor of physiology and kinesiology at Penn State University, how extreme heat affects humans.
item.content:encoded: As heatwaves sweep the country, NPR's A Martinez asks W. Larry Kenney, professor of physiology and kinesiology at Penn State University, how extreme heat affects humans.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Vatican declares the Society of St. Pius X is in schism, excommunicating its bishops
item.description: On Thursday, the Vatican formalized the excommunications and declared that the Society of St. Pius X had entered schism, breaking communion with the pope and the Catholic Church.
item.content:encoded: On Thursday, the Vatican formalized the excommunications and declared that the Society of St. Pius X had entered schism, breaking communion with the pope and the Catholic Church.
item.dc:creator: Claire Giangrave

item.title: Search team from Los Angeles joins earthquake rescue efforts in Venezuela
item.description: In Venezuela, emergency crews - including a team from LA - are working tirelessly to reach those still missing after last week's earthquakes.
item.content:encoded: In Venezuela, emergency crews - including a team from LA - are working tirelessly to reach those still missing after last week's earthquakes.
item.dc:creator: John Otis

item.title: Democratic socialists pose a challenge for the party as midterms approach
item.description: A string of high-profile victories by democratic socialists is posing a challenge for Democrats as they look ahead to midterms and seek a path back to the majority in Congress.
item.content:encoded: A string of high-profile victories by democratic socialists is posing a challenge for Democrats as they look ahead to midterms and seek a path back to the majority in Congress.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore
